Title: Registrazione Utente
Test Steps:
1. Aprire l'applicazione
2. Selezionare l'opzione "Registrati"
3. Inserire i dati richiesti (nome, cognome, email, password)
4. Selezionare l'opzione "Registrati"
Expected Result: L'utente deve essere in grado di registrarsi e ricevere una conferma di registrazione.

Title: Login Utente
Test Steps:
1. Aprire l'applicazione
2. Selezionare l'opzione "Accedi"
3. Inserire l'email e la password
4. Selezionare l'opzione "Accedi"
Expected Result: L'utente deve essere in grado di accedere all'applicazione con le proprie credenziali.

Title: Aggiungere Segnalazione
Test Steps:
1. Aprire l'applicazione
2. Selezionare l'opzione "Segnalare"
3. Inserire i dati richiesti (tipo di segnalazione, luogo, descrizione)
4. Selezionare l'opzione "Invia"
Expected Result: La segnalazione deve essere inviata e visualizzata nell'applicazione.

Title: Specifica Tipo Segnalazione
Test Steps:
1. Aprire l'applicazione
2. Selezionare l'opzione "Segnalare"
3. Selezionare il tipo di segnalazione
Expected Result: Il tipo di segnalazione deve essere selezionabile e visualizzabile nell'applicazione.

Title: Specifica Luogo Segnalazione
Test Steps:
1. Aprire l'applicazione
2. Selezionare l'opzione "Segnalare"
3. Selezionare il luogo di segnalazione
Expected Result: Il luogo di segnalazione deve essere selezionabile e visualizzabile nell'applicazione.

Title: Riceve Notifica
Test Steps:
1. Aprire l'applicazione
2. Ricevere una notifica
Expected Result: L'utente deve ricevere la notifica e essere in grado di visualizzarla.

Title: Visualizzare Segnalazione
Test Steps:
1. Aprire l'applicazione
2. Selezionare l'opzione "Segnalazioni"
Expected Result: Le segnalazioni deve essere visualizzabili nell'applicazione.

Title: Modificare Segnalazione
Preconditions: L'utente deve essere loggato e avere la possibilità di modificare la segnalazione
Test Steps:
1. Aprire l'applicazione
2. Selezionare l'opzione "Segnalazioni"
3. Selezionare una segnalazione
4. Modificare i dati richiesti (tipo di segnalazione, luogo, descrizione)
5. Selezionare l'opzione "Salva"
Expected Result: La segnalazione deve essere modificata e visualizzata nell'applicazione.

Title: Visualizzare Profilo
Test Steps:
1. Aprire l'applicazione
2. Selezionare l'opzione "Profilo"
Expected Result: Il profilo dell'utente deve essere visualizzabile nell'applicazione.

Title: Modificare Profilo
Test Steps:
1. Aprire l'applicazione
2. Selezionare l'opzione "Profilo"
3. Modificare i dati richiesti (nome, cognome, email)
4. Selezionare l'opzione "Salva"
Expected Result: Il profilo dell'utente deve essere modificato e visualizzato nell'applicazione.

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The app is installed on the device
Test Data: Username, Password, Name, Surname, Gender, Date of Birth, Phone, Email
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Click on the Register button
3. Enter the required information
4. Click on the Register button
Expected Result: The account is registered and the user is logged in

Title: User Login
Preconditions: The user has installed the app and has an account
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Click on the Login button
3. Enter the email and password
4. Click on the Login button
Expected Result: The user is authenticated and redirected to the main screen of the application

Title: Report Emergency
Test Steps:
1. Click on the Report Emergency button
2. Select the type of emergency
3. Enter the location of the emergency
4. Click on the Submit button
Expected Result: The emergency is reported and saved in the database

Title: Create User
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for the first time.
2. Navigate to the registration screen.
3. Fill out the registration form with required information.
4. Submit the registration form.
Expected Result: The user is registered and added to the database.

Title: Modify Profile
Test Data: New information (residence, phone number, personal data).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile screen.
2. Select the "Modify Profile" option.
3. Update the user's information.
4. Save the changes.
Expected Result: The user's information is updated in the database.

Title: Report Incident
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the incident report screen.
2. Fill out the incident report form with required information.
3. Submit the incident report.
Expected Result: The incident is reported and added to the database.

Title: View Incident
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the incident view screen.
2. Select an incident from the list.
3. View the incident details.
Expected Result: The incident details are displayed.

Title: Add Comment to Incident
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the incident comment screen.
2. Select an incident from the list.
3. Enter a comment in the comment box.
4. Submit the comment.
Expected Result: The comment is added to the incident.

Title: View Incidents on Map
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the map screen.
2. View the incidents marked on the map.
Expected Result: The incidents are displayed on the map.

Title: Collaborate on Incident
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the incident collaboration screen.
2. Select an incident from the list.
3. Collaborate with other users on the incident.
Expected Result: The incident is managed collaboratively with other users.

Title: Update User Location
Test Steps: 1. The user's location is periodically updated.
Expected Result: The user's location is updated in the database.

Title: View Nearby Incidents
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the nearby incidents screen.
2. View the incidents nearby the user.
Expected Result: The nearby incidents are displayed.

Title: Add a Report
Test Data: Incident type (as defined in the PDF).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the reporting section.
2. Select the incident type.
3. Enter incident details.
4. Submit the report.
Expected Result: The report is added to the system and visible to other users.

Title: Clean and intuitive interface
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate through the application
3. Observe the layout and design of the application
Expected Result: The application should have a clean and intuitive interface that is easy to navigate.

Title: Firebase database usage
Preconditions: User is on the application and has an internet connection
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Check if the application is able to connect to the Firebase database
Expected Result: The application should be able to connect to the Firebase database and store/retrieve data as required.

Title: Internet connection requirement
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Check if the application requires an internet connection to function
Expected Result: The application should require an internet connection to function.

Title: GPS functionality requirement
Preconditions: User is on the application and has GPS enabled on their device
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Check if the application requires GPS to function
Expected Result: The application should require GPS to function and be able to track the user's location.

Title: Data security
Preconditions: User is on the application and has an internet connection
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Enter sensitive user data
3. Check if the data is transmitted securely and stored securely in the database
Expected Result: The sensitive user data should be transmitted securely and stored securely in the database.

Title: Performance
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Perform various actions within the application
3. Check if the application performs well and responds in a timely manner
Expected Result: The application should perform well and respond in a timely manner.

Title: Portability
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on a device running Android version 8.1 or higher
2. Check if the application is compatible with the device and runs without any issues
Expected Result: The application should be compatible with the device and run without any issues.

Title: Storage requirement
Test Steps:
1. Install the application
2. Check if the application requires sufficient storage space to install and run
Expected Result: The application should require approximately 300 MB of storage space to install and run.

Title: Chat functionality
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Check if there is a chat feature for users to communicate in real-time
Expected Result: There should be a chat feature for users to communicate in real-time.

Title: Comments feature
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Check if there is a feature for users to add comments to events
Expected Result: There should be a feature for users to add comments to events.

Title: User can create an account
Preconditions: The application is downloaded from the store and installed correctly on the phone.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on the "Register" button.
3. Enter the required details (username, email, password, etc.).
4. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is able to create an account and navigate within the application.

Title: User can modify personal information
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile section.
2. Click on the "Edit" button.
3. Update the phone number and address fields.
4. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user has modified their personal information related to the application.

Title: User can add a predefined report
Preconditions: The user has registered correctly and is aware of the application rules.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report section.
2. Select a predefined report type.
3. Enter the required details for the report.
4. Click on the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: A new report is created.

Title: User can view all reports made by the community
Preconditions: The user has registered correctly and is aware of the application rules.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the view reports section.
2. Verify that the map displays all reports made by the community.
Expected Result: The user has visualized the map with all reports.

Title: User can disconnect from the application
Preconditions: The user is connected to the application.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the settings section.
2. Click on the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: The user is no longer connected to the application.

Title: User can reconnect to the application
Preconditions: The user is not connected to the app.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on the "Login" button.
3. Enter the registered username and password.
4. Click on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is connected to the app.

Title: User can manage reports
Preconditions: The user has registered correctly and is aware of the application rules.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the manage reports section.
2. Select a report.
3. Perform the desired action on the report (edit, delete, etc.).
Expected Result: The user has modified the reports.

Title: Verification of traceability between requirements
Test Steps: 1. Verify the traceability between functional and non-functional requirements as listed in the table.
Expected Result: The traceability between functional and non-functional requirements is correct.
